violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Several buckets of raw chicken in batter were on kitchen floor upon arrival. *Moved to counter top immediately. Staff was frying off the batch. -Strainer pan of shredded cabbage stored on floor in walk in freezer. *COS-moved off of floor.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Ice scoop laying with handle in ice.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage * was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Cook line prep table found with temperatures of 44F at top and bottom of unit(beef from walk in cooler 38). -Single door Coke cooler found with temperatures of 43F,45F,48F (ambient temperature 42.2F after removing cake box from top shelf). -2 door Coke cooler found with temperatures of 43F, 45F, 47F (ambient 45.5F).

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Cloths used to cover pre-made fried chicken, egg rolls, crab Rangoon, etc.

General equipment and utensils - Use limitations of certain materials. — --Material of food contact equipment/utensil is not approved for use by food service code. -Chips stored in dark totes without liners at the cookline and in the basement. -Rice soaking in brown tote container

Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Multiuse food-contact surfaces did not meet design and/or construction requirements. -Food jug (i.e. vinegar) cut to be used as scoops in 3 of the 5 bulk ingredient containers in basement prep area (flour, corn starch, etc.).

Handwashing lavatories. — --Hand washing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Hand sink is not easily accessible at server station, therefore the larger sink is used for hand washing and as server prep/dump sink. -Hand sink at cook line is in the far corner, has strainer in drain, and appears to be used as food prep/dump sink. -Employee bathroom hand sink faucet is not working -Metal scrubber in kitchen sink basin.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Hand wash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -2nd basin at 2 comp sink near dishwasher is used for hand washing but does not have paper towels available.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
